description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js Package that can be triggered manually or when a release is created. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read access to repository contents and write access to packages. Check out the repository, set up an emscripten cache, and install Node.js 18. Then, in a specific working directory, install dependencies with npm ci, run a build script with npm run build, and publish the package to npm using a token from secrets.
